title: lathyrus pratensis var. binatus
intro: Lathyrus pratensis var. binatus, also known as the meadow vetchling, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The meadow vetchling has been used to treat various health issues, such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones, due to its potential to promote urination and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal properties, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
